title: US Government orders Anthropic to disable AI models after pressure from Amazon and other companies
summary: The US administration forced Anthropic to suspend two artificial intelligence models, sparking debate in India about the future of AI.

title: State Attorneys General investigate OpenAI over ChatGPT safety
summary: Several US states have subpoenaed OpenAI to provide information about ChatGPT's safety.

title: KPMG withdraws AI report due to fake case studies and hallucinations
summary: Consultancy KPMG removed a report on artificial intelligence after it was discovered to contain fabricated case studies.

title: Meta unwinds $2 billion deal with Manus under pressure from Beijing
summary: Meta is unwinding a $2 billion deal with startup Manus following demands from the Chinese government.

title: Valve sends Steam Machine units for review and will reveal price in June
summary: The first Steam Machines from Valve are being sent to reviewers, and the official price will be announced in late June.

title: Nintendo's lawsuit against Pocketpair over Palworld concludes without victory in sight
summary: Nintendo faces difficulties in its lawsuit against the creators of Palworld, which began two years ago and is about to be resolved.

title: Apple M5 Max chip could cause discoloration on MacBook screens due to overheating
summary: The excessive heat generated by Apple's M5 Max processor could damage MacBook screens.

title: AMD finally accepts warranty for Ryzen 9 7950X3D over swelling issue
summary: AMD gave in to pressure and is covering Ryzen 9 7950X3D processors that show deformation under warranty.

title: Microsoft loses hundreds of dollars on each Xbox Series X|S sold
summary: The sale of Xbox Series X|S consoles generates significant losses for Microsoft, which is seeking solutions.

title: 1,579 malicious packages infect Arch Linux AUR
summary: Over 1,500 malicious packages were detected in the Arch Linux User Repository (AUR).

title: The first 6G network in Spain could be operational by the end of 2030
summary: The first commercial 6G network in Spain could begin operating by the end of 2030.

title: Apple shows Siri AI advancements ahead of iOS 27 launch
summary: Apple presented new artificial intelligence features for Siri that will arrive with the iOS 27 update.

title: FAA rule change could skyrocket drone usage
summary: The US Federal Aviation Administration is modifying a regulation that could significantly increase drone usage.

title: Phoenix LiveView 1.2 released with performance and feature improvements
summary: The new version of Phoenix LiveView brings important improvements for real-time web applications.

title: Google Cloud launches Open Knowledge format to convert documents into Markdown for AI agents
summary: Google Cloud's new format allows transforming scattered documentation into Markdown files ready to be used by artificial intelligence agents.

title: Study reveals AI coding agents locate files but not the exact relevant lines
summary: Researchers found that AI coding agents often identify the correct file but fail to find the specific lines of code.

title: New AI model 'Count Anything' counts objects with precision
summary: The artificial intelligence model 'Count Anything' is capable of counting any object in an image, a task more complex than it seems.

title: DJI sues Insta360 and the latter responds with counterclaim over patents
summary: DJI has taken legal action against Insta360 for patent infringement, and Insta360 has responded with a counterclaim.

title: Free tool converts SQL to ER diagrams in the browser without uploading data
summary: A new online tool allows transforming SQL queries into entity-relationship diagrams securely, as no information needs to be uploaded to the server.

title: Thin speaker for under the pillow helps sleep without headphones
summary: A speaker-like device placed under the pillow allows listening to audio without headphones, aiding sleep.
